use_cases: Selecting an AI language model from a dropdown in chat or generation interfaces
Switching between different LLM providers in AI tooling applications
Configuring model preferences in developer-facing SaaS dashboards
Choosing backend AI models for text or code generation workflows
Enabling users to pick disabled or available models with visual feedback
ai_summary: A composite dropdown selector component built on Radix UI for choosing AI language models. Renders a list of predefined models (DeepSeek, Llama, GPT variants) with inline SVG icons per provider, supports disabled states for individual models, and exposes standard select props for form integration. Uses flat Tailwind styling suitable for developer tools and SaaS dashboards.
